items.description: SLICE-0071: required summary field on all 5 template schemas, rendered atop the body, exposed as the --summary create flag
steps: Add `summary: { type: string, required: true, min: 10, max: 200 }` to the schema block of all five templates/*.md (prd, slice, decision, doc, handoff)
Render a summary line at the top of each template body (under the id/title line)
Confirm createGeneric auto-derives the --summary flag and validation enforces min/max; omitting --summary fails with a missing-required-field error
Update existing test fixtures / create calls that now miss the required summary so the suite stays green
Add a test: create with --summary succeeds and renders the line; create without --summary fails; an existing artifact lacking summary still validates on read (grandfathered)
Verify: bun run build && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test tests/

items.description: SLICE-0072: generate a static per-project index.md at wiki sync (id, title, summary, status from frontmatter)
steps: In src/cli/verbs/sync.ts, after the qmd embed loop, scan every artifact under projects/<project>/, read frontmatter (id, title, summary, status, group)
Write projects/<project>/index.md as plain markdown (table or list), sorted by kind then id, linked ids, no prose duplication, NO Dataview/Bases
Idempotent overwrite each sync; create must never write index.md
Add a test against a TEMP vault fixture (follow existing tests/ patterns): sync writes index.md listing the artifacts; re-running yields identical bytes
Verify: bun run build && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test tests/

items.description: SLICE-0073: group: frontmatter sections the generated index.md (no folders)
steps: Add optional `group: { type: string }` to the kind schemas
In the index.md generator, section artifacts under ## <group> headings; ungrouped fall under ## General
No physical folder nesting; path-containment guard unchanged
Add a test (temp vault): grouped artifacts appear under their group heading, ungrouped under General
Verify: bun run build && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test tests/

items.description: SLICE-0074: strip template-bleed from all 5 templates (source fix only)
steps: Read SLICE-0058 first to avoid duplicating the renderer work it already did on existing files
Edit all five templates/*.md: remove the Templater <%* ... %> comment block, the INPUT[select(...)] status widget, and the instructional > blockquotes under each section
Keep clean fixed section headings the author fills, and the summary line added in item 1
Verify wiki create of each of the 5 kinds (against a temp vault) produces an artifact with no bleed markers (INPUT[select, <%*, instructional blockquotes)
Do NOT modify existing vault artifacts (that is deferred SLICE-0075)
Verify: bun run build && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test tests/

verification_gates.name: build+tsc+tests
verification_gates.command: bun run build && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test tests/
